history.description: The Greatest Showman (2017) Release Date The Greatest Showman on Earth is expected to become a musical biography following the life of American showman named P. T. Barnum. Bill Condon and Jenny Bicks have written the script which Michael Gracey is bringing to life as a director hired in summer 2011.
